java:S1659.name: Multiple variables should not be declared on the same line

java:S106.name: Standard outputs should not be used directly to log anything

java:S1141.name: Try-catch blocks should not be nested

java:S1192.name: String literals should not be duplicated

java:S3776.name: Cognitive Complexity of methods should not be too high

java:S6541.name: Methods should not perform too many tasks (aka Brain method)

java:S112.name: Generic exceptions should never be thrown

java:S135.name: Loops should not contain more than a single "break" or "continue" statement

java:S125.name: Sections of code should not be commented out

java:S100.name: Method names should comply with a naming convention

java:S116.name: Field names should comply with a naming convention

java:S1488.name: Local variables should not be declared and then immediately returned or thrown

java:S1611.name: Parentheses should be removed from a single lambda parameter when its type is inferred

java:S2140.name: Methods of "Random" that return floating point values should not be used in random integer generation

java:S3358.name: Ternary operators should not be nested

java:S107.name: Methods should not have too many parameters

java:S6353.name: Regular expression quantifiers and character classes should be used concisely

java:S3740.name: Raw types should not be used

java:S1700.name: A field should not duplicate the name of its containing class

java:S1172.name: Unused method parameters should be removed

java:S1118.name: Utility classes should not have public constructors

java:S2201.name: Return values from functions without side effects should not be ignored

java:S1126.name: Return of boolean expressions should not be wrapped into an "if-then-else" statement

typescript:S3358.name: Ternary operators should not be nested

typescript:S6853.name: Label elements should have a text label and an associated control

typescript:S4325.name: Redundant casts and non-null assertions should be avoided

typescript:S2004.name: Functions should not be nested too deeply

typescript:S4624.name: Template literals should not be nested

typescript:S6479.name: JSX list components should not use array indexes as key

typescript:S6571.name: Type constituents of unions and intersections should not be redundant

typescript:S7781.name: Strings should use "replaceAll()" instead of "replace()" with global regex

typescript:S6848.name: Non-interactive DOM elements should not have an interactive handler

typescript:S1082.name: Mouse events should have corresponding keyboard events

typescript:S3923.name: All branches in a conditional structure should not have exactly the same implementation

typescript:S4138.name: "for of" should be used with Iterables

typescript:S6847.name: Non-interactive elements shouldn't have event handlers

typescript:S7773.name: Number static methods and properties should be preferred over global equivalents

typescript:S6772.name: Spacing between inline elements should be explicit

typescript:S125.name: Sections of code should not be commented out

typescript:S6478.name: React components should not be nested

typescript:S1871.name: Two branches in a conditional structure should not have exactly the same implementation

typescript:S6644.name: Ternary operator should not be used instead of simpler alternatives

typescript:S7744.name: Unnecessary fallback objects should not be used when spreading in object literals

typescript:S6535.name: Unnecessary character escapes should be removed

typescript:S6749.name: Redundant JSX fragments should be removed

typescript:S7723.name: Built-in constructors should be called consistently with or without "new"

typescript:S2301.name: Methods should not contain selector parameters

typescript:S7721.name: Functions should be moved to the highest possible scope

typescript:S6481.name: React Context Provider values should have stable identities

typescript:S6844.name: Anchor tags should not be used as buttons

typescript:S7755.name: Complex index access patterns should be replaced with ".at()" method
